subcategory: 3D pixel-art rocket launch animation with retro typography
use_cases: Landing page hero section for space-themed SaaS products
Crypto/fintech landing pages with 'to the moon' messaging
Creative agency portfolios with playful 3D elements
Startup landing pages seeking memorable first impressions
ai_summary: A dynamic 3D hero component featuring an animated pixel-art rocket with continuous motion and bloom post-processing effects. The component uses retro pixel typography with staggered text animations on a responsive full-screen layout. The space-themed aesthetic with neon accents creates an engaging visual experience suitable for modern web landing pages.
